query:
INSERT INTO wallets (target_type, target_id, balance, total_earned)
           VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $3)
           ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id) DO UPDATE
               SET balance      = wallets.balance      + $3,
                   total_earned = wallets.total_earned  + $3,
                   updated_at   = NOW()
           RETURNING id
